name: Chipotle Steak Bites with Creamy Chipotle Pasta
description: Seared chipotle-marinated steak bites served over a creamy, smoky chipotle pasta with spinach. High protein, low fat, and packed with flavor.

ingredientSections.heading: Chipotle Steak Bites
items: 650g lean steak, diced (rump with fat trimmed, top sirloin, or flank)

steps: Toss the diced steak with chipotle paste, garlic powder, onion powder, smoked paprika, dried coriander, and lime juice. Set aside to marinate while you prep the pasta.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the penne according to package instructions. Reserve 100ml of pasta water before draining.
While the pasta cooks, add all sauce ingredients (milk, cream cheese, parmesan, garlic, chipotle paste, honey, salt) to a blender and blend until smooth.
Heat a large pan over high heat with cooking spray. Sear the steak bites for 1-2 minutes per side until browned but still juicy. Remove and rest.
In the same pan (or the pasta pot), pour in the blended sauce and warm gently. Add the spinach and stir until wilted.
Add the drained pasta to the sauce, loosening with reserved pasta water as needed until creamy.
Divide pasta between 4 portions and top with the chipotle steak bites.
